inputs.label: Fluid Density (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: The density of the fluid through which the object moves. For air at sea level and 15°C, use 1.225 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: The density of the fluid through which the object moves. For air at sea level and 15°C, use 1.225 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesnenin içinde hareket ettiği akışkanın yoğunluğu. Deniz seviyesinde ve 15°C'de hava için 1,225 kg/m³ kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Dichte des Fluids, durch das sich das Objekt bewegt. Für Luft auf Meereshöhe und 15 °C verwenden Sie 1,225 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La densité du fluide dans lequel l'objet se déplace. Pour l'air au niveau de la mer et à 15°C, utiliser 1,225 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.es: La densidad del fluido a través del cual se mueve el objeto. Para aire a nivel del mar y 15°C, use 1.225 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.ar: كثافة المائع الذي يتحرك من خلاله الجسم. للهواء عند مستوى سطح البحر و15 درجة مئوية، استخدم 1.225 كجم/م³.

inputs.label: Flow Velocity (v)
inputs.businessContext: Relative velocity between the object and the fluid.

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative velocity between the object and the fluid.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesne ile akışkan arasındaki bağıl hız.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse relative entre l'objet et le fluide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad relativa entre el objeto y el fluido.

inputs.label: Drag Coefficient (Cd)
inputs.businessContext: Empirical coefficient that depends on the shape of the object. Typical values: smooth sphere 0.47, streamlined body 0.04, cube 1.05.

businessContext_i18n.en: Empirical coefficient that depends on the shape of the object. Typical values: smooth sphere 0.47, streamlined body 0.04, cube 1.05.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesnenin şekline bağlı ampirik katsayı. Tipik değerler: düzgün küre 0,47, aerodinamik gövde 0,04, küp 1,05.
businessContext_i18n.de: Empirischer Koeffizient, der von der Form des Objekts abhängt. Typische Werte: glatte Kugel 0,47, stromlinienförmiger Körper 0,04, Würfel 1,05.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient empirique dépendant de la forme de l'objet. Valeurs typiques : sphère lisse 0,47, corps profilé 0,04, cube 1,05.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente empírico que depende de la forma del objeto. Valores típicos: esfera lisa 0.47, cuerpo aerodinámico 0.04, cubo 1.05.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل تجريبي يعتمد على شكل الجسم. القيم النموذجية: كرة ملساء 0.47، جسم انسيابي 0.04، مكعب 1.05.

inputs.label: Reference Area (A)
inputs.businessContext: The frontal area of the object perpendicular to the flow, or other appropriate reference area.

businessContext_i18n.en: The frontal area of the object perpendicular to the flow, or other appropriate reference area.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesnenin akışa dik ön alanı veya uygun başka bir referans alanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Stirnfläche des Objekts senkrecht zur Strömung oder eine andere geeignete Bezugsfläche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La surface frontale de l'objet perpendiculaire à l'écoulement, ou autre surface de référence appropriée.
businessContext_i18n.es: El área frontal del objeto perpendicular al flujo, u otra área de referencia apropiada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المساحة الأمامية للجسم العمودية على التدفق، أو أي مساحة مرجعية أخرى مناسبة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
